docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,375.00 FILED BY KONDY NORMAN DBA NORMAN KONDY URBAN DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS GREG DBA WILLIAMS + TANAKA WILLIAMS & TANAKA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
